title: Only Hotbar / 10 Inventory Slots
description: You only have your hotbar and offhand, a total of 10 inventory slots.
body:
A slightly updated version of csdg's datapack which limits the inventory to only 10 slots.

Changes:

*Barriers are not stackable, so it looks more clean as they don't bunch up

*Barriers will be deleted when picked up with the cursor, so they can't be accidentally grabbed or be purposefully moved to unitended spaces.
